Bathroom.title: Bathroom
Bathroom.description: Represents a single bathroom and its current status.

name.description: The name or number of the bathroom.

location.description: The physical location (e.g., 3rd floor left side).

currentUser.description: Name of the person currently using the bathroom.

cooldownEndTime.description: Firestore Timestamp indicating when the cooldown period ends.

updatedAt.description: Firestore Timestamp of the last status update.

/bathrooms/{bathroomId}/occupancy/curren.description: Private occupancy details, only visible to admins.
